/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/solar_system.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/solar_system.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/solar_system.dir/src/solar_system.cpp.o CMakeFiles/solar_system.dir/src/celestialBody.cpp.o CMakeFiles/solar_system.dir/src/shader.cpp.o -o solar_system  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGL.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libglfw.so.3.4 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLEW.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLU.so
